Class BaseJsonRpcTool

java.lang.Object
org.consensusj.jsonrpc.cli.BaseJsonRpcTool
All Implemented Interfaces:
ToolProvider
Direct Known Subclasses:
BitcoinCLITool
public abstract class BaseJsonRpcTool extends Object implements ToolProvider
An abstract base class for JsonRpcClientTool that implements ToolProvider and uses Apache Commons CLI
